creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
brooks      2007-12-28 21:38:13 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/ganglia-webfrontend Makefile 
  Removed files:
    sysutils/ganglia-webfrontend/files version.php 
  Log:
  Run configure to generate a version.php file rather than maintaining our
  own copy that I alwasy forget to update.  This fixes the incorrect version
  appearing on webpages.
  
  Reported by:    Michael Fuckner <michael at fuckner dot net>
  PR:             ports/119110
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.15      +4 -2      ports/sysutils/ganglia-webfrontend/Makefile
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/sysutils/ganglia-webfrontend/files/version.php (dead)
